summary: Baricitinib is an approved DMARD specifically indicated for moderate-to-severe rheumatoid arthritis that has failed prior treatment with conventional DMARDS or biologics; it demonstrates meaningful clinical efficacy despite notable risks such as increased mortality and cancer. Its effectiveness remains well-supported by trial data within defined patient populations.
